title: stelis physoglossa
intro: Stelis physoglossa is a type of orchid plant that is native to tropical regions, particularly in Central and South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Stelis physoglossa include its ability to alleviate symptoms of asthma, reduce mucus production, and soothe irritated throats. Stelis physoglossa can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support respiratory health and relieve congestion.
